frames.caption: A red-haired person in winter clothing stands in a misty, snow-covered landscape with dark rocky outcrops.
A silhouetted figure leaps through a snowy, misty environment with a weapon raised overhead, while another character stands in the blurred foreground.
Kratos grapples with a large, reptilian humanoid creature in a snowy, misty environment.
Two figures confront each other in a misty, snow-covered mountain landscape.
A red-haired person in a brown coat struggles through deep snow against a cracked, icy wall in a blizzard.
